## Change / 改动

Describe the growth decision, content, or repository behavior changed.

说明本次改动影响的增长决策、内容或仓库行为。

## Evidence / 证据

List the strongest sources and label participant accounts, company claims, editorial synthesis, and causal conclusions.

列出最强来源，并区分参与者讲述、公司主张、编辑综合与因果结论。

## Boundaries / 边界

State missing evidence, transfer limits, and claims this change does not support.

说明缺失证据、迁移边界，以及本次改动不能支持的结论。

## Checklist / 检查清单

- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md` and `EDITORIAL.md`.
- [ ] English and Chinese pages have equivalent structure and conclusions.
- [ ] Knowledge definitions and Case Library evidence remain in their owning sections.
- [ ] Relevant indexes and reciprocal links are updated.
- [ ] Theme pages contain exactly five detailed company cases.
- [ ] Source dates, attribution, quantitative context, and limitations are preserved.
- [ ] `ruby scripts/validate-content.rb` passes.
- [ ] This PR does not include `docs/`, secrets, private data, or unrelated generated files.
